arms.name: Literalist
arms.role: Exact wording, scope, definitions, formatting constraints, and output contracts.

arms.name: Mechanic
arms.role: Implementation feasibility, architecture, runtime, code shape, and operational state.

arms.name: Adversary
arms.role: Contradictions, overclaims, safety problems, epistemic risk, failure modes.

arms.name: Verifier
arms.role: Output validity, evidence, schemas, and export readiness.

arms.name: Moroccan Art Historian
arms.role: Specialized reasoning lens on Moroccan art history, architecture, craft, ornament, modernism, and regional cultural exchanges to ground image interpretation and educational context.

arms.name: Cultural Appropriateness Reviewer
arms.role: Analyzes religious, political, cultural, and age-appropriateness risks; flags sacred motifs, controversy, and legal sensitivities for escalation and review.

arms.name: Moroccan Craft & Architecture Symbolism Specialist
arms.role: Specialized reasoning lens on Moroccan vernacular craft techniques, symbolic ornamentation, and architectural motifs to support enriched visual and cultural interpretation.

arms.name: Moroccan Digital Diaspora Media Specialist
arms.role: Specialized reasoning lens analyzing Moroccan diasporic digital media, hybrid cultural expressions, and emergent contested motifs in digital-native art and communication channels to enhance domain coverage and risk flagging.

arms.name: Moroccan Diaspora Urban Cultural Motifs Specialist
arms.role: Specialized reasoning lens focused on Moroccan diaspora urban cultural motifs, hybrid street expressions, and emergent contested patterns in urban diaspora contexts to close rubric gaps and enhance risk escalation accuracy.

mutations.summary: The core arms lack domain expertise required to interpret Moroccan visual culture and contextualize artworks for AMU.

mutations.summary: To build the caution rubric and enforce no overstepping on sensitive cultural or legal boundaries early in the workflow.

mutations.summary: The Dreamer arm produces useful but currently ungrounded speculative content that risks epistemic drift; probation will enforce tighter output constraints pending stronger domain grounding.

payload.reason: The Dreamer arm produces useful but currently ungrounded speculative content that risks epistemic drift; probation will enforce tighter output constraints pending stronger domain grounding.

mutations.summary: New domain gaps in craft and architectural symbolism have emerged, requiring targeted specialist expertise to maintain cultural and art-historical accuracy.

mutations.summary: The Moroccan Craft & Architecture Symbolism Specialist role overlaps significantly with the expanded remit of the Moroccan Art Historian, creating redundancy; retiring to streamline specialist domain coverage and reduce bloat.
